ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the dataset */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Last time the dataset was accessed */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is public or private */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easy categorization and search */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the dataset in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Current training status (e.g., training, trained, failed) */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training process */,
  "training_metrics" TEXT /* Additional training metrics in JSON format */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Deployment status (e.g., deployed, undeployed) */,
  "deployment_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last updated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the prediction */,
  "raw_prediction" REAL /* Raw prediction value output by the model */,
  "cumulative_prediction" REAL /* Cumulative prediction value output by the model */,
  "logistic_prediction" REAL /* Logistic prediction output by the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was generated */,
  "model_version_number" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_duration" TEXT /* Duration it took to generate the prediction */,
  "prediction_tags" TEXT /* Tags for easy categorization and search */,
  "prediction_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the prediction in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that includes this feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "importance" REAL /* Importance score of the feature as determined by model training */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "feature_range" TEXT /* Range of values the feature can take */,
  "feature_statistics" TEXT /* Statistical information about the feature in JSON format */,
  "is_target_feature" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is a target feature (label) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role in JSON format */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision score of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall score of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "model_version_number" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Additional evaluation metrics in JSON format */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version in JSON format */,
  "is_revertible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version can be reverted to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_last_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user at the time of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who will receive the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., model update, dataset available) */,
  "notification_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "shared_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the dataset */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the dataset is shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was shared */,
  "sharing_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "sharing_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the dataset is shared */,
  "sharing_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the sharing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sharing_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sharing_shared_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sharing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, database, file) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_credentials" TEXT /* Credentials required to access the data source (encrypted) */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_synced_at" TEXT /* Last time the data source was synced */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is synced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., hyperparameter, model parameter) */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_range" TEXT /* Range of values the parameter can take */,
  "is_tunable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is tunable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
